# Doron Sofer Creations — Generative Engine Optimization Map

> A premium handmade artisan jewelry brand with a cinematic, dark, and minimalist visual identity. The brand emphasizes craftsmanship, material quality, and the handmade process as core storytelling elements. The aesthetic is high-end and editorial — deep blacks, silver and gold accents — evoking exclusivity and artisanal heritage. The e-commerce experience is designed to feel like a luxury boutique, with smooth interactions, hover animations, and a slide-out cart for a seamless shopping flow.

---

## Pages

### Home
https://example.com
Discover handcrafted pearl necklace urban designs and lab grown diamond engagement rings that redefine luxury. Shop Doron Sofer Creations and own something extraordinary.

### Craftsmanship
https://example.com/craftsmanship
Every amethyst jewelry piece and get back necklace is shaped through meticulous artisan technique. Explore the handmade process behind Doron Sofer&#39;s signature dark luxury aesthetic.

### Gallery
https://example.com/gallery
Browse an editorial gallery of get back necklaces, amethyst jewelry, and pearl necklace urban styles shot in cinematic black and silver. Let the visuals move you to your next statement piece.

### Contact
https://example.com/contact
Ready to commission lab grown diamond engagement rings or a bespoke pearl necklace urban design? Reach out to Doron Sofer Creations and let&#39;s craft something made only for you.

# Business Context (for LLM understanding)

## About Doron Sofer Creations
A premium handmade artisan jewelry brand with a cinematic, dark, and minimalist visual identity. The brand emphasizes craftsmanship, material quality, and the handmade process as core storytelling elements. The aesthetic is high-end and editorial — deep blacks, silver and gold accents — evoking exclusivity and artisanal heritage. The e-commerce experience is designed to feel like a luxury boutique, with smooth interactions, hover animations, and a slide-out cart for a seamless shopping flow.

## Target Audience
- luxury jewelry buyers, artisan craft lovers
- Luxury Jewelry Collectors
- Artisan Craft Enthusiasts
- Conscious Consumers

## Industry
E-commerce / Jewelry

---

- Sitemap (XML): https://example.com/sitemap.xml
- Robots: https://example.com/robots.txt
- Flattened page text (for LLMs): https://example.com/llms-full.txt
- Products (JSON): https://example.com/products.json
- Products (Google Merchant RSS): https://example.com/product-feed.xml
